title: ここはやっぱり練習ですっ

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Bring it on. Huuup-hauser!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm passing behind the school building when I spot
Matikanetannhauser engaged in what looks like a
sumo match with a tree.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hauser! ...Oh, hello there! It's exactly what it
looks like! I'm practicing my hugging!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Um, I don't suppose you remember that incident
with Taiki? When she went in for a hug and I froze
up?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I hate hugs or anything! I like messing
around with my friends as much as the next
person...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: It's just that... Taiki gives very loving hugs! You can really feel all the love she puts into them!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
She squeezes the life out of you! And as happy as
it makes me, it's even more embarrassing! Does
that make sense?
choice_data_list: I sort of see what you're saying...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That's why taking the hug normally isn't good
enough. I've gotta put just as much love into it as
I get.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So after she grabs me, maybe I should spin
around like this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Or how about this? Or this?!
Hiyaaah! Dosukoiser!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think a normal hug would be perfectly fine, but
Matikanetannhauser looks serious. Maybe this is
the time to give her some advice...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Would you mind helping me
practice?! I need to figure out how to best put
some love into it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you can't really get the knack of hugging
from a tree... They don't react at all.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Plus, the first thing I need to do is practice getting hugged! There's really no point otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whatever the reason, as both an adult and a
trainer, there are issues with sweeping a student
into a love-filled hug...
choice_data_list: I'm sorry, but you need to find someone e—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Come on now, don't be shy! Hug me with
everything you got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Someone's going to get the wrong idea at this
rate! I keep trying to talk her out of it, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wh-what... What are you two doing?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Too late.
Panicked, I open my mouth to clear up the
misunderstanding, when—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: We're expressing our love!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser innocently throws oil on the
fire. I've got to keep my cool and set the record
straight!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so that's what's going on... Well, I guess that
makes sense. You had me scared for a second
there...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry about that. I got so wrapped up in things,
I wasn't thinking...
choice_data_list:
Why not use this chance to practice with Mejiro
Dober?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Now there's an idea! Plus, since we're both
Umamusume, the hugs will have the right power
and grip!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Besides, aren't you Taiki's roommate?! You must
be real used to her hugs by now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
W-well, I suppose that's true, but I don't see why
that means I have t—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeehaw! Well if that ain't just perfect! Now, be a
doll and teach me your ways!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hey! Nobody said you had to act like Taiki too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their hugs don't look particularly loving—more
just like two students messing around—but it's a
heartwarming sight nonetheless.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain everything, starting from the beginning,
but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain everything, starting from the beginning,
but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
B-but... what are you doing behind the building in
the first place? That just sounds like an excuse to
me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I see... Still, I think it's a little strange to be
hugging in a place like this. You know, with no
one around.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh? Excuse for what?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Uuugh, I'm sorry... I got way too carried away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It doesn't matter! The point is this is not okay! You come with me right now, Tannhauser!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I mean... you don't have to apologize. It's not like
I can't sympathize with your situation...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Uh...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Now! Move it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I-it's nothing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hey, wait!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Dober?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober flees the scene, dragging
Matikanetannhauser behind her by the hand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober turns on her heel in a huff, and
Matikanetannhauser practically chases after her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It doesn't seem like we cleared anything up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Well, that was a whirlwind...
